source_areas.description: Local Go command-line interface for imports, predictions, evaluation, exports, registries, reports, gates, and simulation.
Internal Go domain package containing all data contracts, model logic, privacy controls, registries, fixtures, and reports.
Static React and Vite dashboard that renders only reproducible, privacy-filtered public export data.
Research, privacy, dataset, equipment, simulation, workflow, collaboration, and open-source boundary documents.
Source-comment generation, documentation drift, tests, privacy, CLI smoke, frontend build, deployment metadata, and CI gates.

feature_surfaces.title: Daily import and synthetic fixtures
feature_surfaces.description: Loads privacy-scoped daily CSV records and generates deterministic synthetic profiles for reproducible research workflows.

feature_surfaces.title: Prediction and evaluation
feature_surfaces.description: Runs a transparent baseline next-day predictor and rolling evaluation with model provenance, errors, hints, and assumptions.

feature_surfaces.title: Privacy gate and public export
feature_surfaces.description: Inspects source fields, flags sensitive notes, removes private values, and creates a reproducible dashboard-safe JSON contract.

feature_surfaces.title: Capability registries and equipment gates
feature_surfaces.description: Publishes explicit adapter, model, dataset, benchmark, profile, and workflow metadata while gating unavailable equipment integrations.

feature_surfaces.title: Flyto2 workflow recipes
feature_surfaces.description: Describes reusable import, privacy, evaluation, benchmark, and export orchestration steps without embedding a scheduler.

feature_surfaces.title: Safety-scoped telomere toy
feature_surfaces.description: Provides a bounded deterministic educational simulation with an explicit non-clinical and non-predictive safety statement.

feature_surfaces.title: Static public dashboard
feature_surfaces.description: Renders privacy-filtered records, model evidence, roadmap readiness, and safety context as a deployable static React application.

feature_surfaces.title: Deployment-aware search metadata
feature_surfaces.description: Indexes only verified production builds and keeps canonical, social, structured, robots, and sitemap URLs aligned across supported static hosts.

feature_surfaces.title: Source-linked declaration documentation
feature_surfaces.description: Requires comments and generated references for every Go type/function/method and every top-level TypeScript type/function/constant.
